fields.description: Format: S-NNN

fields.name: name
fields.title: Name
fields.description: Full name (or role/group if individual not yet identified)

fields.name: organization_role
fields.title: Organization / Role
fields.description: Organization and project role

fields.name: contact
fields.title: Contact
fields.description: Primary contact method

fields.name: category
fields.title: Category
fields.description: Internal / External / Sponsor / Regulator / Customer / Supplier / Team

fields.name: interest
fields.title: Interest
fields.description: What the stakeholder cares about

fields.name: expectations
fields.title: Expectations
fields.description: What the stakeholder expects to receive

fields.name: potential_influence
fields.title: Potential Influence
fields.description: High / Medium / Low

fields.name: risk_to_project
fields.title: Risk to Project
fields.description: Stakeholder-related risk if not engaged

fields.name: date_identified
fields.title: Date Identified
fields.description: Date added to register

A10.pmbok8_ref: PMBOK8 Guide §2.5 Stakeholders Performance Domain; Table 2-1 Plan Communications Management

fields.name: stakeholder_communications_needs
fields.title: Stakeholder communications needs
fields.description: Summary of what information each key stakeholder group requires

fields.name: communication_item_register
fields.title: Communication item register
fields.description: What is communicated, to whom, by whom, frequency, format, channel

fields.name: sender_and_receiver_responsibilities
fields.title: Sender and receiver responsibilities
fields.description: Who is accountable for producing and distributing each communication

fields.name: communication_channels_and_tools
fields.title: Communication channels and tools
fields.description: Approved tools and channels (email, portal, meetings, reports, dashboards)

fields.name: escalation_communications
fields.title: Escalation communications
fields.description: How and when escalation communications are triggered and structured

fields.name: sensitive_information_handling
fields.title: Sensitive information handling
fields.description: Rules for confidential, commercially sensitive, or regulated information

fields.name: communication_feedback_mechanism
fields.title: Communication feedback mechanism
fields.description: How the team will know whether communications are effective

fields.name: glossary_terminology_alignment
fields.title: Glossary / terminology alignment
fields.description: Common terms used to ensure clarity across stakeholder groups

fields.name: change_description
fields.title: Change description
fields.description: What is changing and for whom

fields.name: stakeholder_group
fields.title: Stakeholder group
fields.description: Affected group or audience

fields.name: readiness_dimension
fields.title: Readiness dimension
fields.description: Awareness, willingness, knowledge, ability, or reinforcement

fields.name: current_readiness_level
fields.title: Current readiness level
fields.description: Assessed state (not ready, developing, ready)

fields.name: target_readiness_level
fields.title: Target readiness level
fields.description: Required state before deployment or go-live

fields.name: adoption_action
fields.title: Adoption action
fields.description: Specific intervention — training, communication, coaching, process update

fields.name: owner
fields.title: Owner
fields.description: Person responsible for the adoption action

fields.name: due_date
fields.title: Due date
fields.description: Target date for action completion

fields.name: feedback_summary
fields.title: Feedback summary
fields.description: Key themes from stakeholder feedback on the change

fields.name: gate_recommendation
fields.title: Gate recommendation
fields.description: Readiness status at each deployment or review gate
